content.Text:
[Tue 2026-04-21 17:10 CDT] Add competitor ad creative screenshots to the BHBMW PMA Intelligence dashboard. The dashboard is at ~/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/bhbmw-pma-intelligence.html

## What to add

Add a new section called "Competitor Ad Creatives" between the competitor cards section and the Galleria benchmark section.

### Price LeBlanc Lexus — Meta Ad Creatives
Show a 2x2 grid of their 4 active ads as images. The screenshots are at:
- ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus/ad_1_view.png
- ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus/ad_2_view.png
- ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus/ad_3_view.png
- ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus/ad_4_view.png

Copy these files to: ~/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/assets/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus/

Below the grid, add a summary callout:
"4 active ads. No pricing. No lease offers. Generic OEM copy — 'Turn every drive into a statement.' Running 2026 TX 350 new inventory + pre-owned Audi Q7/Q8. Zero local angle."

### Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge — Meta Ad Creatives
Show their best 5 ads as images. The screenshots are at:
- ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/mercedes-br/ad_1_view.png
- ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/mercedes-br/ad_2_view.png
- ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/mercedes-br/ad_3_view.png
- ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/mercedes-br/ad_4_view.png
- ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/mercedes-br/ad_5_view.png

Copy these files to: ~/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/assets/creatives/mercedes-br/

Below the grid, highlight the key offer in a green callout box:
"⚡ Active offer: 2026 GLC 300 — $499/mo for 24 months + 2.99% APR financing up to 60 months. Running CPO narrative: '3/30 guarantee' (3-day return, 30-day exchange) + 164-point inspection. 8 active ads with real offers and pricing."

## Design
- Section header: "Competitor Ad Creatives — Meta (Facebook/Instagram)" with subtitle "Source: Meta Ad Library — April 21, 2026"
- Same dark slate theme as rest of dashboard
- Price LeBlanc Lexus: orange/amber accent (weak competitor)
- Mercedes BR: red accent (strong competitor with real offers)
- Images should be max-width: 280px, border-radius: 8px, with a subtle border
- Label each image with the model name below it
- Make images display inline/grid, not full-width

## After adding the section, push to GitHub:
```bash
cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards
git add -A
git commit -m "TAS: Add competitor Meta ad creative screenshots to BHBMW PMA dashboard"
git push
```

Confirm push succeeded and report the live URL:
https://thecooperativeagency.github.io/Ga4-dashboards/bhbmw-pma-intelligence.html
I'll start by reading the dashboard file and checking the creative screenshots exist.

Thinking.text:
Now I need to:
1. Copy the creative files to the dashboard assets directory
2. Look at the screenshots to understand what models are shown
3. Add the new section to the HTML

Let me first view the screenshots to label them properly, and copy the files.

content.Text: Let me view the screenshots to properly label them, and copy the files simultaneously.

ToolUse.raw_input: {"command":"mkdir -p /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/assets/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/assets/creatives/mercedes-br && cp /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus/ad_{1,2,3,4}_view.png /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/assets/creatives/price-leblanc-lexus/ && cp /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/mercedes-br/ad_{1,2,3,4,5}_view.png /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/assets/creatives/mercedes-br/ && echo \"Done\"","description":"Copy creative screenshots to dashboard assets"}

input.description: Copy creative screenshots to dashboard assets

Thinking.text:
Now I have all the info I need. Let me summarize what I saw in the screenshots:

**Price LeBlanc Lexus ads:**
1. Ad 1: 2026 Lexus TX 350 PREMIUM AWD (carousel with multiple vehicles)
2. Ad 2: 2026 Lexus TX 350 PREMIUM AWD (same carousel, different version)
3. Ad 3: Pre-Owned 2023 Audi Q7 2.0T quattro Premium Plus
4. Ad 4: Pre-Owned 2021 Audi Q8 3.0T quattro Premium Plus


5. Ad 5: 2024 Mercedes-Benz E 350 (CPO, 3/30 guarantee)
6. Ad 6: 2024 Mercedes-Benz C 300 (new inventory push)
7. Ad 7: 2025 Mercedes-Benz GLC 300 (CPO, 164-point inspection)
8. Ad 8: 2024 Mercedes-Benz CLE 300 (new inventory)
9. Ad 9: 2026 Mercedes-Benz GLC 300 SUV ($499/mo)

Now I need to position a new section between the competitor cards and the Benchmark Store area, adding the necessary styling and markup to integrate it properly.

content.Text:
Now I have all the details from the screenshots. Let me add the new section with CSS and HTML.

**Price LeBlanc Lexus ads:** Ad 1: 2026 TX 350 Premium AWD, Ad 2: 2026 TX 350 Premium AWD (variant), Ad 3: Pre-Owned 2023 Audi Q7, Ad 4: Pre-Owned 2021 Audi Q8

**Mercedes-Benz BR ads:** Ad 1: 2024 E 350 (CPO/3-30), Ad 2: 2024 C 300, Ad 3: 2025 GLC 300 (CPO), Ad 4: 2024 CLE 300, Ad 5: 2026 GLC 300 ($499/mo lease)

content.Text:
Push succeeded. Done.

**Added to the BHBMW PMA Intelligence dashboard:**

- **New "Competitor Ad Creatives" section** between competitor cards and Galleria benchmark
- **Price LeBlanc Lexus** — 4 ads in a grid (2026 TX 350 AWD x2, Pre-Owned Audi Q7, Pre-Owned Audi Q8) with orange accent callout noting generic OEM copy and zero local angle
- **Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge** — 5 ads in a grid (E 350 CPO, C 300, GLC 300 CPO, CLE 300, 2026 GLC 300 lease) with green accent callout highlighting the $499/mo lease offer and CPO narrative
- All 9 screenshots copied to `assets/creatives/` and committed

**Live at:** https://thecooperativeagency.github.io/Ga4-dashboards/bhbmw-pma-intelligence.html
